title.en: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Life Asoke Rama 9
title.zh: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Life Asoke Rama 9
title.th: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Life Asoke Rama 9

summary.zh: 出售：1卧，35㎡，4,040,000 泰铢。来源 DotProperty #e73ef2df0216-f2f0-e182-eb19-57bdc089。
summary.th: ขาย: 1 นอน 35 ตร.ม. ราคา 4,040,000 บาท (DotProperty #e73ef2df0216-f2f0-e182-eb19-57bdc089)

description.en:
This 1-bedroom condo at Life Asoke Rama 9 offers a rare mix of lifestyle comfort, strong rental appeal, and investment value in Bangkok’s fast-growing Rama 9 New CBD. With an existing tenant at ฿23,000/month and a current ROI of approximately 5.63%, this unit is ideal for buyers who want income potential from day one.
Why This Unit Stands Out

Approximately 21.66% below market price, making it a highly attractive entry point
Currently tenanted at ฿23,000/month with around 5.63% ROI
Spacious 35.49 sqm 1-bedroom layout, practical and comfortable for city living
8th floor with forest, nature, and garden views for a calmer urban atmosphere
Well maintained, move-in ready, and finished in a modern minimalist style

Property Details

1 Bedroom | 1 Bathroom | 8th Floor | 35.49 sqm
The unit features a balcony, bathroom, kitchen, laundry/utility area, microwave, washing machine, TV, warm and cool white lighting, recessed lighting, painted plaster walls, wood accents, premium finishing, and excellent natural light.
The layout feels clean, modern, and easy to live in or rent out.

Ideal ForPerfect for investors seeking immediate rental income, professionals working around Rama 9, Asoke, and Ph
